query:
-- What enrichmentStatus do non-manual contacts on active projects have?
SELECT c.enrichmentStatus, c.enrichmentSource, COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts c
INNER JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
INNER JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE (p.suppressed = false OR p.suppressed IS NULL)
  AND (p.lifecycleStatus = 'active' OR p.lifecycleStatus = 'awarded')
  AND c.enrichmentSource != 'manual'
GROUP BY c.enrichmentStatus, c.enrichmentSource
ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
-- What enrichmentStatus do non-manual contacts on active projects have?
SELECT c.enrichmentStatus, c.enrichmentSource, COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts c
INNER JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
INNER JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE (p.suppressed = false OR p.suppressed IS NULL)
  AND (p.lifecycleStatus = 'active' OR p.lifecycleStatus = 'awarded')
  AND c.enrichmentSource != 'manual'
GROUP BY c.enrichmentStatus, c.enrichmentSource
ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20;
